nodes.label: Duration Pills UI — Focus Session Setup (15m/30m/45m/1h)
nodes.description: Horizontal pill row for selecting focus session duration: 15 min, 30 min, 45 min, 1 hora. Appears on the home/session-setup screen above the app-blocking section.

nodes.label: App Blocking Toggles — Social Apps List (pills-v2)
nodes.description: Section 'Mejora tu concentración — Estas apps no te interrumpirán durante el enfoque'. Toggle list: Instagram (Red social), TikTok (Vídeos cortos), YouTube (Vídeos), X (Red social), Facebook (Red social). All toggles appear OFF in this screenshot. '+ Agregar apps' CTA at bottom.

nodes.label: Ritual Complements Grid — Pre-session (pills-v2)
nodes.description: Section 'Complementos del ritual — Pequeñas prácticas que se completan durante el enfoque' with Editar action. 2-column grid cards: Meditar (10 min), Leer (20 pp), Estudiar (45 min), Respirar (5 min), Gratitud (x veces), Entrenar (30 min), Journaling (visible). No CTA button visible yet.

nodes.label: Mentex Tweaks DevTools Panel (pills-v2 context)
nodes.description: Developer overlay panel visible on right: sections AUTH (DEV), ESTADO (Home — Inactivo/Activo toggle), ACENTO (Color principal teal), ESTILO DE CARDS (Tarjetas: Glass/Lineas/Plano), TIPOGRAFÍA (Familia: Geist/Inter/Manrope). Used for design QA / theming iteration.

edges.description: Duration selector and app-blocking toggles co-exist on the same session-setup home screen
App blocking and ritual complements are the two main configuration sections on the pre-session home screen
Mentex Tweaks devtools panel co-visible with app-blocking section during design QA; ESTADO toggle controls Inactivo/Activo session state
